header.name: Jaya Simha Reddy Nandyala
header.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
header.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 6.5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and cloud-native solutions. Expertise in React, Next.js, Java Springboot, Python FastAPI, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure). Currently driving AI-First Software Delivery at Thoughtworks. Strong advocate of Test Driven Development and Extreme Programming methodologies. Proven track record of translating complex business requirements into high-quality, production-ready features. Quick learner who thrives in fast-paced, agile environments.

experience.techStack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, AWS, DynamoDB, FastAPI, Python, Playwright
achievements: Pioneering AI-First Software Delivery practices, integrating AI tools and workflows to accelerate development cycles and enhance code quality.
Architecting modern web applications using Next.js and React with TypeScript for enterprise clients in the retail domain.
Building serverless backend services with FastAPI and AWS Lambda, leveraging DynamoDB for high-performance data persistence.
Establishing comprehensive end-to-end testing strategies using Playwright, ensuring robust test coverage across critical user journeys.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams following Agile and XP practices to deliver high-quality solutions iteratively.

experience.techStack: ReactJS, Java Springboot, Azure Cloud, TypeScript, Python
achievements: Delivered end-to-end features for a Wealth Management Application, strictly following TDD and XP methodologies to ensure code quality and maintainability.
Partnered with Business, Product, and Design teams to understand domain complexities, gather requirements, and incorporate feedback through iterative development.
Engineered Azure serverless functions in TypeScript and Python, optimizing performance for complex financial calculations.
Mentored a team of 5 interns, guiding them in building data analytics dashboards using Azure App Insights, KQL, and Grafana.

experience.techStack: React JS, Redux, Redux Saga, SignalR Client
achievements: Transformed feature specifications into fully functional, responsive UI components using React JS and Redux state management.
Implemented real-time data synchronization using SignalR, enabling push-based architecture for live updates.
Ensured application quality through comprehensive Unit, Security, and Accessibility testing (ADA compliance).
